constraints.description: All professional meetings must occur in business-appropriate settings (offices, hotels, conference centers). No casual venues (bars, coffee shops, parks).
Must accompany mother to neurology appointments on the second Tuesday of each month, 2-4pm. Cannot schedule travel or external meetings during this window.
Must be reachable by phone after 7pm on weekdays in case of mother's health incidents. Cannot attend multi-day off-site events without arranging a designated emergency contact.

notes: Close relationships outside work. Primary family contact for mother's medical care.

constraints.description: Must dedicate 2 evenings per week for mentee check-ins and one-on-ones (uninterrupted 1-hour slots, 5pm onwards).
Must attend at least 4 women-in-leadership conferences or mentorship summit events per year.

notes: Active mentor for junior female leaders. Executive sponsor of diversity initiatives.
